title: Beginner Guide
subtitle: START HERE
intro: Welcome to the beginner guide for Sword Blox Online: Rebirth.
This page is designed to help new players understand where to start, what matters early, and what mistakes to avoid.

sections.title: SYSTEM NOTICE
sections.text: Do not try to learn everything at once. Focus on surviving and understanding that basics first.

sections.title: Helpful Information
paragraphs: You do not need perfect gear or full game knowledge to get started. Simply join in and play!
Right out of the tutorial in game you will be teleported to the first floor 'The Town of Beginnings' Here you can find a starter shop with you basic Gear and Weapons. As well as potion shop.
It is a good idea to go to floor 2 and start the quest by the spawn. It will give you some good exp and some COL (Money) That you can use later on.
Every time you level up, you gain 3 stat points. The best method of using them is to do 2 defense and 1 strength. Keep doing that. It will help you out so much.
When you kill a mob or boss in the game you will see a pop up saying what you earned. Exp, Items, Col. You will get SK as well as Exp. This is for your sword skills and level.
Your sk unlocks better skills and better swords you can use. Each floor has a max amount of sk you can get so be mindful of that.
At first you will only be able to buy health potion 1. These will help you if you get too low on HP. The crystals are the best, but they are spendy.
The game at first is slow, just keep at it. It is recommended you join a guild. Most high level players will help you farm levels and bosses.

sections.title: Your First Goals
items: Choose a weapon type you enjoy.
Get basic armor or protection if available.
Fight enemies you can safely handle.
Use the COL you get from mobs and quests to buy health potions.

sections.title: BEGINNER TIP
sections.text: Do the quests on floor 2 to get some good exp and starter COL.

sections.title: Swordsman Fields
sections.caption: This is the first combat floor you will come across. Focus more on the Level 1 Boars by spawn. It is slow, but you will get exp and eventually move on.

sections.title: Early Game Priorities
rows: One Hand is best to start with
Helps you with fighting better or not dying as much
Can get you killed or stuck

sections.title: Common Beginner Mistakes
items: Not visiting shops on the floors to get better gear.
Spreading out stat points. You only get so many.
Pushing too far with too low of a level. Take your time to do things right.

sections.title: SYSTEM WARNING
sections.text: Rushing progression before you understand healing, gear, and safe farming routes can slow you down more than it helps.

sections.title: DANGER
sections.text: Do not throw all your stat points into a build just because somebody told you it is good. The BEST thing to do is do 2 Defense and 1 Strength. Do not worry about AGI, Luck, or Vitality when first starting.
